title: How to get recommended by AI (IMO)
summary: I'm almost sure everyone has already told everything you need to know about GEO/AEO. Here to share my practical experience and some experiments results. Disclaimer: I'm writing from my smartphone and my English not the best, sorry for typos. My background: - 31 years - 13 years in web development - startup with 1.7M users, exit in 2018; 450k users from SEO - started learning Machine Learning in 2019. - worked with two big companies over last 3 years developing AI agents - working on a next pet S
